text: Mo lo OPay lati ran owo si Access Bank, sugbon transaction naa wa ni pending, mo fe reversal.
translation: I used OPay to send money to Access Bank, but the transaction is pending, and I want reversal.

text: Mo lo PalmPay lati ran owo si Fidelity Bank, sugbon transaction naa wa ni successful, mo fe failed transfer.
translation: I used PalmPay to send money to Fidelity Bank, but the transaction is successful, and I want failed transfer.

text: Mo lo Moniepoint lati ran owo si FCMB, sugbon transaction naa wa ni timeout, mo fe chargeback.
translation: I used Moniepoint to send money to FCMB, but the transaction is timeout, and I want chargeback.

text: Mo lo Kuda lati ran owo si First Bank, sugbon transaction naa wa ni pending, mo fe dispute.
translation: I used Kuda to send money to First Bank, but the transaction is pending, and I want dispute.

text: Mo lo Paga lati ran owo si GTBank, sugbon transaction naa wa ni successful, mo fe transaction history.

text: Mo lo Pocket lati ran owo si UBA, sugbon transaction naa wa ni timeout, mo fe customer care.

text: Transfer lati Premium Trust Bank si Optimus Bank ni transaction reference sugbon ko si receipt.
translation: The transfer from Premium Trust Bank to Optimus Bank has a transaction reference but no receipt.

text: Transfer lati Providus Bank si Parallex Bank ni transaction reference sugbon ko si receipt.

text: Transfer lati Lotus Bank si Alternative Bank ni transaction reference sugbon ko si receipt.
translation: The transfer from Lotus Bank to Alternative Bank has a transaction reference but no receipt.

text: Carbon app mi so pe wallet balance lori transfer si Access Bank.
translation: My Carbon app says wallet balance on the transfer to Access Bank.

text: FairMoney app mi so pe account restricted lori transfer si Fidelity Bank.
translation: My FairMoney app says account restricted on the transfer to Fidelity Bank.

text: ALAT app mi so pe daily limit lori transfer si FCMB.

text: Paystack payment lori Verve card ni debit card, mo nilo help.
translation: The Paystack payment on a Verve card has a debit card issue, and I need help.

text: Flutterwave payment lori Visa card ni virtual card, mo nilo help.
translation: The Flutterwave payment on a Visa card has a virtual card issue, and I need help.

text: Interswitch payment lori Mastercard card ni debit, mo nilo help.
translation: The Interswitch payment on a Mastercard card has a debit issue, and I need help.

text: Remita payment lori Verve card ni credit, mo nilo help.
translation: The Remita payment on a Verve card has a credit issue, and I need help.

text: USSD lori Paga ko sise, customer care bot ko ran mi lowo.
translation: USSD on Paga is not working, and the customer care bot did not help.

text: ATM lori Pocket ko sise, customer care bot ko ran mi lowo.
translation: ATM on Pocket is not working, and the customer care bot did not help.

text: POS lori NowNow ko sise, customer care bot ko ran mi lowo.
translation: POS on NowNow is not working, and the customer care bot did not help.

text: QR Code lori KongaPay ko sise, customer care bot ko ran mi lowo.
translation: QR Code on KongaPay is not working, and the customer care bot did not help.

text: Mo fe so BVN ati NIN mo account mi fun KYC, sugbon OTP ko de.
translation: I want to link BVN and NIN to my account for KYC, but the OTP did not arrive.

text: Mo gbagbe PIN ati password mi, sugbon app ko gba verification.
translation: I forgot my PIN and password, but the app does not accept verification.

text: NIBSS nilo Session ID ati NIP details fun NUBAN account number.
translation: NIBSS needs Session ID and NIP details for the NUBAN account number.

text: Mo ri unauthorized debit, won ni o je scam, sugbon wrong recipient nilo court order.
translation: I saw an unauthorized debit; they said it is a scam, but the wrong recipient case needs a court order.

text: Beneficiary ko ri credit, debit card ati virtual card mejeeji ni issue.
translation: The beneficiary did not receive credit, and both the debit card and virtual card have issues.

text: OPay transfer mi kuna si GTBank.
translation: OPay transfer mi kuna si GTBank.

text: App OPay mi ko fi Session ID han.
translation: App OPay mi ko fi Session ID han.

text: OPay POS agent na mi double debit.
translation: OPay POS agent na mi double debit.

text: Mo fe reversal lori OPay receipt mi.
translation: Mo fe reversal lori OPay receipt mi.

text: PalmPay si Access Bank wa ni pending.
translation: PalmPay si Access Bank wa ni pending.

translation: Mo fe link BVN mi lori PalmPay fun KYC.

translation: Moniepoint POS mi ni timeout lori NIP transfer.

translation: Nibo ni Session ID wa lori receipt?
